# WG-Easy

WireGuard VPN management panel with a web UI.

## Quick Start

```bash
# Copy environment
cp .env.example .env

# Edit .env with your values
# WG_HOST=YOUR_PUBLIC_IP
# PASSWORD_HASH=<generated by wg-easy>

# Start
docker compose up -d
```

## Ports

| Port | Protocol | Service |
|------|----------|---------|
| 51820 | UDP | WireGuard VPN |
| 51821 | TCP | Web UI |

## Network

- Container IP: `10.8.1.2`
- Network: `wg-easy` (subnet: `10.8.1.0/24`)
